name: Curve Finance
special_mechanism_summary: Curve uses the StableSwap invariant for near-zero slippage on correlated assets plus a ve/gauge system (veCRV time-lock, weekly gauge weight votes directing CRV emissions) and crvUSD with LLAMMA — a continuous liquidation AMM that converts collateral to stablecoin gradually as price falls, avoiding cliff liquidations.
notes: C3' combination potential: extremely high — veCRV controls CRV emission routing across all gauges, enabling protocols like Convex to extract economic rent; StableSwap amplification parameter A creates price-impact timing windows; donation patterns to pool contracts shift the internal D invariant; crvUSD LLAMMA exchange rate is readable and consumed by downstream protocols as a price source.
